description:
## Goal

Build `guru/model.py` — provider abstraction so the runtime can target Ollama, Anthropic, or OpenAI without code changes elsewhere.

## File Location

`guru/model.py`

## Interface

```python
class ModelProvider(Protocol):
    def complete(self, prompt: str) -> str: ...

class OllamaProvider:    # default; base_url="http://localhost:11434"
class AnthropicProvider: # uses anthropic SDK; respects ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
class OpenAIProvider:    # uses openai SDK; respects OPENAI_API_KEY
```

A factory `provider_from_config(cfg) -> ModelProvider` reads `config/model.toml` and returns the right instance.

## Subtasks (from doc)

- OllamaProvider
- AnthropicProvider
- OpenAIProvider

## Acceptance Criteria

- All three providers implement the Protocol identically
- Provider swap requires only a config change — no edits in retriever/cli/prompt
- Anthropic and OpenAI providers are guarded by the optional-dependencies extras

resolution.note: guru/model.py: ModelProvider wrapping llm.call_llm. Reads provider/model/max_tokens from config/model.toml. generate(system, prompt) single entrypoint.
